{"files": [{"path": "requirements.txt", "content": "fastapi uvicorn jinja2 python-multipart"}, {"path": "main.py", "content": "from fastapi import FastAPI, Request, Form from fastapi.templating import Jinja2Templates from fastapi.responses import HTMLResponse, RedirectResponse import uuid from datetime import datetime app = FastAPI() templates = Jinja2Templates(directory='templates') db = { 'projects': [ {'id': '1', 'project_name': 'Q2 Blog Campaign', 'client_name': 'TechCorp', 'status': 'Active', 'created_at': '2026-03-01'}, {'id': '2', 'project_name': 'Social Media Kit', 'client_name': 'BrandX', 'status': 'Completed', 'created_at': '2026-03-10'}, {'id': '3', 'project_name': 'Newsletter Series', 'client_name': 'EduStart', 'status': 'Draft', 'created_at': '2026-04-01'}, {'id': '4', 'project_name': 'Product Descriptions', 'client_name': 'ShopZone', 'status': 'Active', 'created_at': '2026-04-05'}, ], 'generated_items': [ {'id': '1', 'project_id': '1', 'item_type': 'text', 'filename': 'blog_post_1.txt', 'download_url': '#', 'created_at': '2026-03-05'}, {'id': '2', 'project_id': '1', 'item_type': 'image', 'filename': 'hero_banner.png', 'download_url': '#', 'created_at': '2026-03-06'}, {'id': '3', 'project_id': '2', 'item_type': 'summary', 'filename': 'summary_report.pdf', 'download_url': '#', 'created_at': '2026-03-12'}, ] } @app.get('/', response_class=HTMLResponse) async def home(request: Request): return templates.TemplateResponse( request=request, name='home.html', context={'projects': db['projects'][:3]} ) @app.get('/projects', response_class=HTMLResponse) async def projects(request: Request, status: str = ''): filtered = [p for p in db['projects'] if p['status'] == status] if status else db['projects'] return templates.TemplateResponse( request=request, name='projects.html', context={'projects': filtered, 'selected_status': status} ) @app.post('/projects') async def create_project(project_name: str = Form(...), client_name: str = Form(...)): db['projects'].append({ 'id': str(uuid.uuid4())[:5], 'project_name': project_name, 'client_name': client_name, 'status': 'Draft', 'created_at': datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d') }) return RedirectResponse(url='/projects', status_code=303) @app.get('/generate', response_class=HTMLResponse) async def generate_page(request: Request): return templates.TemplateResponse( request=request, name='generate.html', context={'projects': db['projects'], 'output': None, 'submitted': False} ) @app.post('/generate', response_class=HTMLResponse) async def generate_content( request: Request, project_id: str = Form(...), content_type: str = Form(...), prompt: str = Form(...) ): output_map = { 'text': f'Generated blog post based on: "{prompt}"\n\nLorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua.', 'image': f'[Image Generated] Prompt: "{prompt}" — Preview available in Results.', 'summary': f'Summary for: "{prompt}"\n\n• Key point one identified\n• Supporting argument analyzed\n• Conclusion synthesized' } output = output_map.get(content_type, 'Content generated.') proj = next((p for p in db['projects'] if p['id'] == project_id), {}) filename = f"{content_type}_{str(uuid.uuid4())[:5]}.txt" db['generated_items'].append({ 'id': str(uuid.uuid4())[:5], 'project_id': project_id, 'item_type': content_type, 'filename': filename, 'download_url': '#', 'created_at': datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d') }) return templates.TemplateResponse( request=request, name='generate.html', context={ 'projects': db['projects'], 'output': output, 'submitted': True, 'content_type': content_type, 'prompt': prompt, 'project_name': proj.get('project_name', '') } ) @app.get('/results', response_class=HTMLResponse) async def results(request: Request): enriched = [] for r in db['generated_items']: proj = next((p for p in db['projects'] if p['id'] == r['project_id']), {}) enriched.append({**r, 'project_name': proj.get('project_name', '—')}) return templates.TemplateResponse( request=request, name='results.html', context={'results': enriched} ) @app.get('/api/projects') async def api_get_projects(): return {'projects': db['projects']} @app.post('/api/projects') async def api_create_project(data: dict): return {'status': 'created'} @app.post('/api/generate') async def api_generate(data: dict): return {'status': 'generated', 'output': 'AI-generated content'} @app.post('/api/results') async def api_export(data: dict): return {'status': 'exported'} "}, {"path": "templates/base.html", "content": " GenAI Studio | AI Content Platform

© 2026 GenAI Studio. AI-Powered Content Generation Platform.

{"files": [{"path": "requirements.txt", "content": "fastapi uvicorn jinja2 python-multipart"}, {"path": "main.py", "content": "from fastapi import FastAPI, Request, Form from fastapi.templating import Jinja2Templates from fastapi.responses import HTMLResponse, RedirectResponse import uuid from datetime import datetime app = FastAPI() templates = Jinja2Templates(directory='templates') db = { 'cars': [ {'id': '1', 'make': 'Toyota', 'model': 'Camry', 'year': 2024, 'price_per_day': 45.0, 'available': True, 'category': 'Sedan'}, {'id': '2', 'make': 'BMW', 'model': 'X5', 'year': 2024, 'price_per_day': 120.0, 'available': True, 'category': 'SUV'}, {'id': '3', 'make': 'Tesla', 'model': 'Model 3', 'year': 2025, 'price_per_day': 95.0, 'available': False, 'category': 'Electric'}, {'id': '4', 'make': 'Ford', 'model': 'Mustang', 'year': 2023, 'price_per_day': 85.0, 'available': True, 'category': 'Sports'}, {'id': '5', 'make': 'Honda', 'model': 'CR-V', 'year': 2024, 'price_per_day': 55.0, 'available': True, 'category': 'SUV'}, {'id': '6', 'make': 'Mercedes', 'model': 'E-Class', 'year': 2025, 'price_per_day': 140.0, 'available': True, 'category': 'Luxury'}, ], 'bookings': [ {'id': 'BK001', 'car_id': '1', 'car_label': 'Toyota Camry', 'start_date': '2026-04-10', 'end_date': '2026-04-13', 'total_amount': 135.0, 'status': 'Confirmed'}, {'id': 'BK002', 'car_id': '2', 'car_label': 'BMW X5', 'start_date': '2026-04-12', 'end_date': '2026-04-15', 'total_amount': 360.0, 'status': 'Pending'}, ], 'reservations': [ {'id': 'RES001', 'car_id': '1', 'car_label': 'Toyota Camry', 'status': 'Active', 'created_at': '2026-04-09'}, {'id': 'RES002', 'car_id': '4', 'car_label': 'Ford Mustang', 'status': 'Cancelled', 'created_at': '2026-04-01'}, ] } @app.get('/', response_class=HTMLResponse) async def home(request: Request): featured = [c for c in db['cars'] if c['available']][:3] return templates.TemplateResponse( request=request, name='home.html', context={'featured': featured} ) @app.get('/browse-cars', response_class=HTMLResponse) async def browse_cars(request: Request, brand: str = '', year: str = '', category: str = ''): results = db['cars'] if brand: results = [c for c in results if c['make'].lower() == brand.lower()] if year: results = [c for c in results if str(c['year']) == year] if category: results = [c for c in results if c['category'] == category] brands = sorted(set(c['make'] for c in db['cars'])) years = sorted(set(str(c['year']) for c in db['cars']), reverse=True) categories = sorted(set(c['category'] for c in db['cars'])) return templates.TemplateResponse( request=request, name='browse_cars.html', context={'cars': results, 'brands': brands, 'years': years, 'categories': categories, 'sel_brand': brand, 'sel_year': year, 'sel_category': category} ) @app.get('/book-rental', response_class=HTMLResponse) async def book_rental_get(request: Request, car_id: str = ''): available = [c for c in db['cars'] if c['available']] selected = next((c for c in db['cars'] if c['id'] == car_id), None) return templates.TemplateResponse( request=request, name='book_rental.html', context={'cars': available, 'selected': selected, 'success': False} ) @app.post('/book-rental', response_class=HTMLResponse) async def book_rental_post( request: Request, car_id: str = Form(...), start_date: str = Form(...), end_date: str = Form(...), payment_method: str = Form(...) ): car = next((c for c in db['cars'] if c['id'] == car_id), None) total = 0 if car: car['available'] = False total = car['price_per_day'] * 3 db['bookings'].append({ 'id': 'BK' + str(uuid.uuid4())[:4].upper(), 'car_id': car_id, 'car_label': f"{car['make']} {car['model']}", 'start_date': start_date, 'end_date': end_date, 'total_amount': total, 'status': 'Confirmed' }) available = [c for c in db['cars'] if c['available']] return templates.TemplateResponse( request=request, name='book_rental.html', context={'cars': available, 'selected': None, 'success': True, 'booked_car': car, 'total': total} ) @app.get('/reservations', response_class=HTMLResponse) async def reservations(request: Request): return templates.TemplateResponse( request=request, name='reservations.html', context={'reservations': db['reservations'], 'bookings': db['bookings']} ) @app.get('/admin-dashboard', response_class=HTMLResponse) async def admin_dashboard(request: Request): total_revenue = sum(b['total_amount'] for b in db['bookings']) available_count = sum(1 for c in db['cars'] if c['available']) return templates.TemplateResponse( request=request, name='admin_dashboard.html', context={'fleet': db['cars'], 'bookings': db['bookings'], 'total_revenue': total_revenue, 'available_count': available_count} ) @app.get('/api/cars') async def api_cars(): return {'cars': db['cars']} @app.post('/api/bookings') async def api_bookings(data: dict): return {'status': 'created', 'booking_id': 'BK' + str(uuid.uuid4())[:5]} @app.post('/api/payments') async def api_payments(data: dict): return {'status': 'payment_processed'} @app.get('/api/reservations') async def api_reservations(): return {'reservations': db['reservations']} @app.get('/api/fleet') async def api_fleet(): return {'fleet': db['cars']} @app.post('/api/pricing') async def api_pricing(data: dict): return {'status': 'pricing_updated'} "}, {"path": "templates/base.html", "content": " DriveEase | Car Rental Platform

{"files": [{"path": "requirements.txt", "content": "fastapi uvicorn jinja2 python-multipart"}, {"path": "main.py", "content": "from fastapi import FastAPI, Request, Form from fastapi.templating import Jinja2Templates from fastapi.responses import HTMLResponse, RedirectResponse import uuid app = FastAPI() templates = Jinja2Templates(directory='templates') db = { 'prices': [ {'symbol': 'BTC', 'name': 'Bitcoin', 'price': 68420.50, 'change_24h': 2.34, 'market_cap': '1.35T'}, {'symbol': 'ETH', 'name': 'Ethereum', 'price': 3812.30, 'change_24h': -1.12, 'market_cap': '458B'}, {'symbol': 'SOL', 'name': 'Solana', 'price': 182.75, 'change_24h': 5.67, 'market_cap': '82B'}, {'symbol': 'BNB', 'name': 'BNB', 'price': 612.40, 'change_24h': 0.88, 'market_cap': '90B'}, {'symbol': 'ADA', 'name': 'Cardano', 'price': 0.58, 'change_24h': -2.41, 'market_cap': '20B'}, {'symbol': 'AVAX', 'name': 'Avalanche', 'price': 38.92, 'change_24h': 3.15, 'market_cap': '16B'}, ], 'portfolios': [ {'id': '1', 'user_id': '1', 'crypto_symbol': 'BTC', 'quantity': 0.45, 'purchase_price': 52000.0}, {'id': '2', 'user_id': '1', 'crypto_symbol': 'ETH', 'quantity': 3.2, 'purchase_price': 2800.0}, {'id': '3', 'user_id': '1', 'crypto_symbol': 'SOL', 'quantity': 25.0, 'purchase_price': 120.0}, {'id': '4', 'user_id': '1', 'crypto_symbol': 'BNB', 'quantity': 5.5, 'purchase_price': 550.0}, ], 'alerts': [ {'id': '1', 'user_id': '1', 'crypto_symbol': 'BTC', 'threshold_price': 70000.0, 'alert_status': 'Active'}, {'id': '2', 'user_id': '1', 'crypto_symbol': 'ETH', 'threshold_price': 4000.0, 'alert_status': 'Active'}, {'id': '3', 'user_id': '1', 'crypto_symbol': 'SOL', 'threshold_price': 150.0, 'alert_status': 'Triggered'}, ] } def get_price(symbol): return next((p for p in db['prices'] if p['symbol'] == symbol), {}) def build_portfolio(): enriched = [] total_value = 0 total_cost = 0 for item in db['portfolios']: p = get_price(item['crypto_symbol']) current_price = p.get('price', 0) current_value = item['quantity'] * current_price cost_basis = item['quantity'] * item['purchase_price'] pnl = current_value - cost_basis pnl_pct = ((pnl / cost_basis) * 100) if cost_basis else 0 total_value += current_value total_cost += cost_basis enriched.append({**item, 'name': p.get('name', item['crypto_symbol']), 'current_price': current_price, 'current_value': current_value, 'pnl': pnl, 'pnl_pct': pnl_pct}) total_pnl = total_value - total_cost total_pnl_pct = ((total_pnl / total_cost) * 100) if total_cost else 0 return enriched, total_value, total_pnl, total_pnl_pct @app.get('/', response_class=HTMLResponse) async def home(request: Request): enriched, total_value, total_pnl, total_pnl_pct = build_portfolio() active_alerts = sum(1 for a in db['alerts'] if a['alert_status'] == 'Active') return templates.TemplateResponse( request=request, name='home.html', context={'top_prices': db['prices'][:3], 'total_value': total_value, 'total_pnl': total_pnl, 'total_pnl_pct': total_pnl_pct, 'active_alerts': active_alerts} ) @app.get('/portfolio', response_class=HTMLResponse) async def portfolio(request: Request): enriched, total_value, total_pnl, total_pnl_pct = build_portfolio() return templates.TemplateResponse( request=request, name='portfolio.html', context={'portfolio': enriched, 'total_value': total_value, 'total_pnl': total_pnl, 'total_pnl_pct': total_pnl_pct, 'alerts': db['alerts']} ) @app.get('/prices', response_class=HTMLResponse) async def prices(request: Request): return templates.TemplateResponse( request=request, name='prices.html', context={'prices': db['prices']} ) @app.get('/alerts', response_class=HTMLResponse) async def alerts_page(request: Request): enriched = [] for a in db['alerts']: p = get_price(a['crypto_symbol']) enriched.append({**a, 'name': p.get('name', a['crypto_symbol']), 'current_price': p.get('price', 0)}) return templates.TemplateResponse( request=request, name='alerts.html', context={'alerts': enriched, 'symbols': db['prices']} ) @app.post('/alerts/create') async def create_alert(crypto_symbol: str = Form(...), threshold_price: float = Form(...)): db['alerts'].append({ 'id': str(uuid.uuid4())[:5], 'user_id': '1', 'crypto_symbol': crypto_symbol, 'threshold_price': threshold_price, 'alert_status': 'Active' }) return RedirectResponse(url='/alerts', status_code=303) @app.get('/api/portfolios') async def api_portfolios(): enriched, total_value, _, _ = build_portfolio() return {'portfolio': enriched, 'total_value': total_value} @app.get('/api/prices') async def api_prices(): return {'prices': db['prices']} @app.post('/api/alerts') async def api_create_alert(data: dict): return {'status': 'alert_created'} "}, {"path": "templates/base.html", "content": " CryptoVault | Portfolio Dashboard
CryptoVault
Portfolio Live Prices Alerts
Set Alert
{% block content %}{% endblock %}
© 2026 CryptoVault. Cryptocurrency Portfolio Tracking Dashboard.
"}, {"path": "templates/home.html", "content": "{% extends 'base.html' %} {% block content %}
